questions.question: Describe the difference between a flat distributed transaction and a nested distributed transaction. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Explain the definitions and scenarios of both types of transactions.

questions.question: An application program wants to execute a series of operations that involve multiple database tables. Which type of distributed transaction would be suitable for this scenario, and explain why?
questions.hint: Consider the characteristics of flat and nested transactions.

questions.question: Suppose you are designing a distributed system for banking transactions. Describe the steps involved in implementing a nested distributed transaction using a distributed transaction manager (DTM).
questions.hint: Outline the process of creating and managing a nested transaction, including the roles of the DTM and the applications involved.
